title: The Killing of Sawrah b. al-Hun al-Tamuni and the Rest of the Campaign
description: The Killing of Sawrah b. al-Hun al-Tamuni and the Rest of the Campaign. Recorded under the year 112 AH (730–731 CE) in al-Tabari's History, volume 25.

sources.citation: al-Tabari, The History of al-Tabari (SUNY), vol. 25
